message:
The other day, we had a sudden thunderstorm that knocked out the power for a few hours. Instead of panicking, I grabbed some flashlights and snacks, and we set up a little indoor picnic in the living room. It turned into a cozy evening filled with laughter, stories, and even a few shadow puppets! 😄

After our makeshift feast, I realized how important it is to have a go-bag ready with essentials, just in case we need to be a bit more prepared. It’s all about turning a potentially stressful situation into a family event, right? 

Have you ever turned an unexpected situation into a fun family moment? Share your stories!
